MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, is present. Represented by Leona Luckett.
Attorney, Margaret Dematteo, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Irving Brown, is present.
Attorney, Morgan Jackson , representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Peter Van Zandt, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept 504A. ,for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JULY 08, 2013 is vacated.
